seoTitle: North Lismore vs North Macquarie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Lismore and North Macquarie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Lismore vs North Macquarie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Lismore and North Macquarie.
heading: North Lismore vs North Macquarie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Lismore, New South Wales and North Macquarie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to North Macquarie (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Lismore or North Macquarie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Lismore has a flood risk score of 39/100, while North Macquarie scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Lismore scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. North Macquarie scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Lismore or North Macquarie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
